channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: RPI Libraries are pleased to provide Nexis+ AI
item.description: In addition to classic Nexis Uni, the RPI community now has access to Nexis+ AI, a strategic research solution designed to empower your academic endeavors by unlocking comprehensive insights and transforming raw data into targeted narratives. Seamlessly navigate vast collections of news, business, legal, financial, and company information using natural language search capabilities and intelligent citation-linked summaries. Whether building a thesis or drafting a research report, Nexis+ AI can…
item.author: Community

item.title: Don’t Forward Threats, Report Them!
item.description: Our Information Security team has experienced an increase of potential Scam and Phishing emails that are being forwarded or sent throughout the RPI Community. If an email does not appear legitimate or doesn’t seem right - Report, Don’t Forward!
item.author: Community

item.title: BME Graduate Symposium
item.description: Date: Thursday, May 21, 2026 8:30 AM - 6:00 PM - The Department of Biomedical Engineering presents its annual Graduate Symposium. Please join us to support our doctoral students as they present their research.
item.author: Community

item.title: East Side Elevated Walkway Closure – Alternate Pedestrian Routes
item.description: Starting May 18, PCC Contracting will begin mobilization and site setup for the RPI East Side Elevated Walkway Project. The elevated walkway and underpass between the Darrin Communications Center (DCC) and Jonsson Engineering Center (JEC) will close on May 20 through the summer, with intermittent impacts anticipated into the fall semester. Alternate pedestrian routes have been established, and wayfinding signage will be installed as construction progresses.
item.author: Community

item.title: Fidelity Confidential Consultation (In Person)
item.description:
Date: Thursday, May 21, 2026 8:00 AM - 4:30 PM - Schedule a confidential consultation to help you become better informed and more confident about your workplace retirement savings plan benefits. To schedule an appointment, call 1-800-642-7131, Monday through Friday, 8:00 am to midnight, or online at https://nb.fidelity.com/public/nbpreloginnav/rpi/microsite/#/tem/meet-with-us

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
